# Ikigai Farm
> A curated outdoor adventure and nature experience destination in Noida, Delhi NCR, India. Inspired by the Japanese philosophy of Ikigai — "a reason for being" — Ikigai Farm offers nature-based activities, celebrations, corporate retreats, farm-to-table dining, and school excursions just a short drive from Delhi.

## About
Ikigai Farm is located at Bandh Rd, Nagla Nagli, Sector 134, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304, India. It is easily accessible from Delhi NCR and offers 40+ adventure and nature-based activities for individuals, families, schools, and corporate groups.

Contact: +91 8006746390
Email: bookings@ikigaifarm.org
Website: https://www.ikigaifarm.org

## Activities
Ikigai Farm offers 40+ activities including:
- Zipline
- ATV Ride
- Archery
- Camel Ride
- Zorbing
- Trampoline
- Rain Dance
- Rope Course
- Tyre Climb
- Pottery
- Farming experiences
- Tractor rides
- Nature walks
- Team-building games
- Culinary workshops

Full activity list: https://www.ikigaifarm.org/Activities

## Experiences
- Weekend Getaways: Nature walks, bonfires, countryside dining for families, couples, and groups
- Corporate Experiences: Team-building, leadership offsites, outdoor workshops, curated retreats
- Celebrations & Events: Birthdays, musical evenings, private dinners, outdoor gatherings
- Nature Based Activities: Immersive outdoor experiences in a farm setting
- Farm to Fork Dining: Fresh farm-to-table meals prepared on site
- Personalized Experiences: Customized itineraries based on group size and interests
- Sustainable Celebrations: Eco-friendly event hosting

Full experiences: https://www.ikigaifarm.org/Experiences

## Events
- Kids Birthday Parties
- Corporate Events
- Farm Weddings
- Family Reunions
- Upcoming Workshops
- Signature Events

Event packages: https://www.ikigaifarm.org/Events

## Food & Dining
- Kids Celebrations menu
- Corporate Party catering
- Weekend Brunch
- Farm to Table meals
- Sundown Table dining experience

Food menu: https://www.ikigaifarm.org/Food

## Schools & Education
Ikigai Farm regularly hosts school trips, excursions, and educational farm visits for students of all ages with interactive and curriculum-linked outdoor experiences.

Schools page: https://www.ikigaifarm.org/Schools

## Group Bookings
Customized packages available for corporate groups, schools, communities, and private events. Fully tailored experiences based on group size, interests, and goals.

Book: https://www.ikigaifarm.org/GroupBookings

## FAQs
- 40+ activities included across all packages
- Food (snacks, high tea, farm-to-table meals) included depending on package
- Located near Sector 134 Noida, accessible from all of Delhi NCR
- Fully customizable events and itineraries
- Regular hosting of schools, corporates, and private groups
